candidates.why: Section/header for revenue, but not the actual populated revenue line; less preferred than the specific revenue row.

candidates.why: Inventory asset, not income statement COGS expense.

candidates.why: Section/header or broad subtotal; too broad for SG&A when explicit SG&A exists.

Section/header, not the expense row itself.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and populated; hierarchy says select only this row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D, not the main current-period R&D expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

candidates.why: Only lease-interest component, not total interest expense.
